---
title: "Gendreau Lab Research Hub"
subtitle: "Predictive modeling, clinical outcomes research, and web-based neurosurgical calculators"
---

::: {.hero-banner}
## Translating registry-scale data into usable clinical research tools

The Gendreau Lab develops neurosurgical outcomes research, predictive models, and web-based calculators using national datasets including NCDB, ACS TQIP, SEER, and institutional data sources.

[View calculators](calculators.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} [View publications](publications.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::

## Featured calculators

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.tool-card}
### Intracranial Chordoma Survival Calculator

**Dataset:** NCDB  
**Outcome:** Overall survival  
**Status:** Published / deployed

[Launch calculator](https://garingriffith-chordoma-survival-calculator.share.connect.posit.cloud){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.tool-card}
### TBI Discharge & Resource Utilization Calculator

**Dataset:** ACS TQIP 2020–2024  
**Outcomes:** Discharge disposition, ICU admission, mechanical ventilation, prolonged LOS

[Add calculator link](calculators.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.tool-card}
### Glioblastoma Survival Calculator

**Dataset:** NCDB  
**Outcome:** Overall survival  
**Status:** In development / deployment

[Add calculator link](calculators.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::
:::
:::

## Research areas

- Neuro-oncology outcomes and survival prediction
- Traumatic brain injury prognosis and resource utilization
- Registry-based neurosurgical epidemiology
- Clinical informatics and web-based decision-support tools
- Vascular and perioperative outcomes research

## Disclaimer

The calculators and materials on this site are intended for research and educational use. They are not a substitute for professional medical judgment and should not be used as the sole basis for clinical decision-making.
